overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates across busy streets with futuristic vehicles, passes industrial buildings with holographic advertisements, and explores massive industrial architecture with towering pipes and tanks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to multi-lane street intersection

events.description: exits covered metal canopy into open street intersection
begins crossing the multi-lane road as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking forward from under the canopy into the street and crossing the road

notable_agents.action: green truck driving along the road from right to left

entered.detail: rusted metal roof structure with fluorescent lighting at the starting point
large concrete overpass with red neon accent lights spanning the street
tall pole with green traffic light illuminated
modern street lamp with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a metal canopy structure with fluorescent lighting. The character walks forward onto a multi-lane street at night, crossing the road as vehicles pass by. The elevated highway overpass looms ahead with distinctive red neon lighting, while street lamps illuminate the cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highway and commercial buildings

events.description: green delivery truck passes by on the right side of the frame
blue pickup truck drives past in the same direction as the character

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk approaching the CYTECH building

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving along the road parallel to the character

entered.detail: low-rise industrial building with large blue neon CYTECH signage
large floating advertisement display showing product images

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open street, the character approaches the CYTECH building with its prominent blue neon signage. Vehicles including a green truck and blue pickup pass by on the road. The elevated highway shifts to the right side of the frame as holographic billboards become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with industrial fencing

events.description: moves under the elevated highway overpass into a more enclosed walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past the CYTECH building entrance along the fenced sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and cybernetic implants walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence running along the sidewalk
large rusted industrial pipes running along the overpass structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the elevated highway into a more enclosed walkway. The CYTECH building is now directly alongside on the left, while a tall metal fence runs along the right. Industrial pipes run overhead, and a pedestrian with distinctive pink hair walks past in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway under massive concrete structures

events.description: turns left at the corner following the fenced pathway
emerges from under the overpass into view of massive industrial tanks

agents.ego_description: navigating the corner and walking along the industrial pathway

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete traffic barriers
enormous cylindrical industrial tanks with metal walkways and platforms

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the corner, the character follows a fenced pathway under the massive concrete overpass. Concrete barriers line the left side. As the character emerges from under the overpass, enormous industrial storage tanks become visible in the distance, marking a transition to a heavy industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with massive architecture and crosswalk

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive industrial tanks and piping overhead
crosses the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: looking up at the massive industrial architecture, then crossing the street and continuing forward

notable_agents.action: bald man in white vest walking past the camera

entered.detail: massive vertical industrial pipes connecting to the overhead tanks
tall chimneys with smoke stacks emitting vapor into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character looks up in awe at the massive industrial tanks and vertical pipes dominating the skyline. After observing the architecture, the character crosses the street at a crosswalk alongside other pedestrians. Industrial chimneys emit vapor in the distance as the character continues through this heavy industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban street into a towering heavy industrial district. It begins under a fluorescent metal canopy, moving forward across a multi-lane road as vehicles pass beneath the red glow of an elevated highway overpass. As the character walks along the open street, the scene shifts toward the blue neon signage of the CYTECH building and distant holographic billboards before transitioning into a more enclosed walkway beneath the highway, flanked by industrial pipes and a metal fence. The camera then turns left, following a fenced pathway and concrete barriers until it emerges from under the overpass to reveal enormous industrial storage tanks. Finally, the view tilts upward to capture the massive vertical pipes and chimneys emitting vapor that dominate the skyline as the character crosses a street into the heart of the industrial zone.
